title: goodenia elaiosoma
intro: Goodenia elaiosoma, also known as Native Violet, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used by Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Goodenia elaiosoma include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Goodenia elaiosoma can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
